news_items.title: Morocco vs Haiti team news and predicted lineups | Squawka | EN
news_items.text:
# Morocco vs Haiti team news and predicted lineups | Squawka | EN

Published: 2026-06-22T18:02:14+00:00
Source: squawka.com (squawka.com)
Language: en

## Story

Morocco vs Haiti team news and predicted lineups | Squawka | EN

Squawka/ News/ World Cup/ Morocco vs Haiti team news and predicted lineups

# Morocco vs Haiti team news and predicted lineups

- Harry Edwards
- 13 minutes ago

- Copied
- Share on Facebook
- Share on X

Morocco will be looking to secure their spot in the knockout stages of the 2026 World Cup when they take on Haiti on Wednesday at 11pm (UK time).

The current Africa Cup of Nations champions are in a very good position to reach the knockout stages, but will want to be absolutely certain. Morocco started the World Cup with a draw against Brazil, before a narrow victory over Scotland. They’ll be group winners if they can better Brazil’s result, or equal it with a better goal difference. A draw will also be enough to secure second, while the fact that eight third-placed sides go through means Morocco are unlikely to be eliminated all together.

Things aren’t as complicated for Haiti. Les Grenadiers have unfortunately been eliminated after losing both of their f

news_items.title: Morocco vs Haiti Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire
news_items.text:
Morocco vs Haiti Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire

# Morocco vs Haiti Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group C

Morocco vs Haiti clash in Atlanta for their decisive 2026 World Cup Group C finale. Predicted lineups, team news, tactical breakdown and score prediction.

Updated on June 24, 2026 2:17AM EST

Share

By:

Pierre Courtin

Adam Zdroik

Updated on June 24, 2026 2:17AM EST

World Cup

Subscribe Log In

From the latest news to creating the best starting lineup, we've got you covered - Sign-up today

# Morocco vs Haiti Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group C

The Group C finale is a study in contrasts. Morocco sit on four points, in control of their own destiny and chasing top spot, while Haiti are already eliminated after two defeats and playing only for pride and a first World Cup point. The gap in quality and motivation is wide, and Morocco will expect to take care of business at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.

Morocco, semifinalists in 2022, carry a deep and talented squad led by Achraf Hakimi and Bra

news_items.author: The Morocco national team heads into its final group-stage match with the opportunity to secure a place in the Round of 32 as the leader of Group C. After drawing against Brazil and defeating Scotland, the Atlas Lions remain unbeaten and in control of their own destiny as they look to complete an impressive opening phase at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

- Home
- >
- Soccer
- >
- FIFA World Cup
- >
- Morocco's Possible Lineup to Face Haiti at the 2026 FIFA World Cup

# Morocco's Possible Lineup to Face Haiti at the 2026 FIFA World Cup

## Morocco enters the final matchday of Group C with qualification all but secured, but still with one objective left to accomplish: finishing top of the group.

The Morocco national team heads into its final group-stage match with the opportunity to secure a place in the Round of 32 as the leader of Group C. After drawing against Brazil and defeating Scotland, the Atlas Lions remain unbeaten and in control of their own destiny as they look to complete an impressive opening phase at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

The side led by Mohamed Ouahbi has displayed defensive solidity, relentless intensity in recovering possession, and an ability to compete against top-level opponents. Now, they will look to build on those performances against a Haiti team that has already been eliminated but will aim to leave the tournament on a positive note.

## Ismael Saibari Leads Morocco's Attack

Much of Morocco's attacking hopes rest on the e

# Morocco vs Haiti team news and predicted lineups

- Harry Edwards
- 13 minutes ago

- Copied
- Share on Facebook
- Share on X

Morocco will be looking to secure their spot in the knockout stages of the 2026 World Cup when they take on Haiti on Wednesday at 11pm (UK time).

The current Africa Cup of Nations champions are in a very good position to reach the knockout stages, but will want to be absolutely certain. Morocco started the World Cup with a draw against Brazil, before a narrow victory over Scotland. They’ll be group winners if they can better Brazil’s result, or equal it with a better goal difference. A draw will also be enough to secure second, while the fact that eight third-placed sides go through means Morocco are unlikely to be eliminated all together.

Things aren’t as complicated for Haiti. Les Grenadiers have unfortunately been eliminated after losing both of their f"}

# Morocco vs Haiti Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group C

The Group C finale is a study in contrasts. Morocco sit on four points, in control of their own destiny and chasing top spot, while Haiti are already eliminated after two defeats and playing only for pride and a first World Cup point. The gap in quality and motivation is wide, and Morocco will expect to take care of business at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta.

# Morocco's Possible Lineup to Face Haiti at the 2026 FIFA World Cup

## Morocco enters the final matchday of Group C with qualification all but secured, but still with one objective left to accomplish: finishing top of the group.

The Morocco national team heads into its final group-stage match with the opportunity to secure a place in the Round of 32 as the leader of Group C. After drawing against Brazil and defeating Scotland, the Atlas Lions remain unbeaten and in control of their own destiny as they look to complete an impressive opening phase at the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

The side led by Mohamed Ouahbi has displayed defensive solidity, relentless intensity in recovering possession, and an ability to compete against top-level opponents. Now, they will look to build on those performances against a Haiti team that has already been eliminated but will aim to leave the tournament on a positive note.

## Ismael Saibari Leads Morocco's Attack
